---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new skill or agent for the builder-ai pack
labels: enhancement
---

## What Are You Proposing?

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New agent
- [ ] Enhancement to an existing skill or agent

Name: `<proposed-skill-or-agent-name>`

## The Builder-AI Test

> Would this be essential for at least 50% of teams building LLM-powered products?

Answer: 

## What Problem Does It Solve?

What do teams consistently skip or get wrong when building LLM products, that this skill/agent would enforce?

## What Would the Law Say?

For skills: what is the one-sentence immutable rule this skill enforces? (Written in ALL CAPS in the skill format)

## What Are the Rationalization Red Flags?

What do builders say when they want to skip this? (These become the "Rationalization Red Flags" section.)

## Why Is This Baseline, Not Specialised?

Why does this belong in builder-ai (broadly applicable) rather than a domain-specific extension?
